reportTeams.heading: My report teams
reportTeams.subheading: Teams are tied to a report draft. Ask the coordinator to assign you to a team, or request to join an existing one.
reportTeams.mockBanner: Front-end mockup — data and requests are simulated until the Nest API is available.

validity.hint: A report team is valid when it has at least one hunter and either a mentor or a quality checker (you may add more members as needed). Only one quality checker is allowed per team, so joining as a quality checker is possible only when the team has none yet.

myTeams.title: Teams I belong to
myTeams.empty: You are not assigned to any report team yet.
myTeams.leaveTeamConfirm: Leave the team « {{label}} »? You will lose access until a coordinator adds you again.
myTeams.primaryHunterLeaveAlert: You are the primary report hunter for this team. You cannot leave on your own — ask the coordinator to assign another primary hunter, then remove you.
myTeams.requestLeavePending: Removal request pending — waiting for the coordinator.

enroll.title: Request assignment to a report team
enroll.description: Your name, user id, and role are sent to the coordinator. They will include you when creating a new team.
enroll.success: Enrollment request sent to the coordinator.
enroll.alreadyPending: You already have a pending enrollment request.
enroll.errorGeneric: Could not send the enrollment request.

askJoin.title: Request to join a team
askJoin.description: Pick the report team (created by the coordinator). They will approve or decline your request.
askJoin.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available yet. The coordinator must create a team for a report draft first.

orphanDrafts.title: Drafts without a team
orphanDrafts.subheading: These report drafts are not linked to any report team (team deleted or never created). The hunter remains the owner. Use the assignment requests above to form a new team on request.
orphanDrafts.empty: No orphan drafts at the moment.

attach.title: Form a team on this draft
attach.description: The owning hunter stays on the team. Check pending enrollment requests (mentor or quality checker) to attach to this draft.
attach.applicantsEmpty: No pending mentor or quality checker enrollment requests.
attach.success: Team created on the orphan draft.
attach.errorApplicants: Select at least one pending request.

admin.heading: Report teams — administration
admin.subheading: Super admin: view, edit, and delete any team. Day-to-day assignments remain with the coordinator.
admin.deleteTeamConfirm: Delete team « {{label}} »? The report draft will remain and appear under « Drafts without team ».
admin.deleteDraftModalBody: This will erase draft « {{label}} » (ID {{draftId}}), all steps, submissions, comments, and the linked team. This cannot be undone.

coordinator.heading: Coordination — report teams
coordinator.subheading: Approve assignment requests and manage team composition.
coordinator.existingTeamRequestsTitle: Requests to join an existing team
coordinator.existingTeamRequestsDescription: Approve to add the person to the team they chose, or reject to decline.
coordinator.existingTeamRequestsEmpty: No pending requests to join existing teams.
coordinator.leaveRequestsDescription: The hunter is still the draft owner (`hunter_id`). Transfer primary hunter on the team page, remove them, then mark the request as handled.
coordinator.applicantsDescription: People who enrolled without picking a specific team. Include them below when you create a new report team.

create.title: Create a report team
create.description: A report draft is created automatically. The team must include at least one hunter and either a mentor or a quality checker. If several hunters are selected, choose which one is the designated step writer (editable later in the draft). You may add more members freely.
create.writerHint: Only this hunter can edit and submit draft steps until the role is handed off on the draft page, or changed by a coordinator on Report team coordination (open the team).
create.errorWriter: Choose which hunter is the designated step writer.

teamDetail.notFound: This team does not exist or you cannot access it.
teamDetail.draftIdHint: Technical id — coordinators do not open the report draft from here.
teamDetail.writerSectionHint: This hunter may edit and submit steps. Coordinators set it here; squad hunters can also hand off on their report draft workspace.
teamDetail.noHunters: This team has no hunters — add members before assigning a writer.
teamDetail.primaryHunterSectionHint: The primary hunter is stored on the report draft (`hunter_id`). Choose any user with the global hunter role from the directory (they are added to the squad if needed). The current primary cannot be removed until you assign another hunter.
teamDetail.primaryHunterNeedAnother: No other hunter accounts are registered in the system.
teamDetail.membersPrimaryHunter: Primary report hunter — cannot be removed.
